feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: The Weight of What He Carries
entry.summary:
Author: KillingButterlies88745

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,034Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 10

Summary: When Arthur starts sensing magic, he assumes the worst. After all, magic is evil. Magic destroys kingdoms. Magic killed his mother. At least, that's what he's always been told. But as Merlin helps him investigate the truth behind his strange new ability, Arthur begins to realise that magic, and perhaps everything he believes about it, is far more complicated than he ever imagined.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: An Insufferable Forever
entry.summary:
Author: Araemrys

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 39,951Chapters: 10/12Kudos: 95

Summary: Merlin, the son of the famous bakers in Camelot, had been assigned by his parents to deliver bread for tonight's feast in the castle. That was the first time he met the prince of Camelot, who wasn't like his expectations at all. Arthur Pendragon, the prince of Camelot, returned to the castle after his mission to secure a village from bandits, only to find a boy standing in a room admiring his mother's painting-a boy he found to be insufferable later. From the day they met, they decided that they wouldn't get along well, only to find a shockingly different path in life that they never expected. or Arthur and Merlin didn't like each other. They remained somehow in a complicated state between enemies and a feeling of interest in each other. That was, until one day a sorceress playfully transported them to the future, only to find they were a happy family with a son.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Maybe, One Day
entry.summary:
Author: sensei_no_petu

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,605Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 56

Summary: Arthur is a prince. Merlin is a servant. It seems simple enough. But is it really?One morning, Arthur cannot find Merlin and later discovers something personal about him, which makes him question the true nature of their relationship.

entry.title: Eye-fucking across a round table
entry.summary:
Author: TheElizaRoza

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 87,715Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 90

Summary: Eye fucking: to stare at someone with nefariously explicit intent and for them to do it back is a bonus. Arthur Pendragon has a problem. He cannot stop staring at Merlin. At first he blames the fact that his servant is irritating, mysterious, and seemingly incapable of acting like a normal person. Then Morgana discovers Merlin's secret, magic begins slipping through the cracks, and Arthur finds himself uncovering layer after layer of the man standing beside him. Set during Season 2. Arthur learns Merlin has far more secrets than anyone suspected and discovers, to his increasing annoyance, that he doesn't seem to care.

entry.summary:

entry.title: I'm not the one you want, babe.
entry.summary:
Author: 3mrys_cc

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,862Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 7

Summary: After Gwen's exile, Arthur is left adrift—grieving, lonely, and desperate for something solid to hold onto. Over time, he begins to seek comfort in Merlin, relying on him more than ever before, until their bond slowly blurs into something deeper. But when Guinevere returns. Arthur is left to untangle feelings he never meant to foster, while Merlin is forced to question whether he was ever truly loved or if he was just in the right place at the right time.

entry.title: The Mad Witch Hunter
entry.summary:
Author: Wolfish_Potato

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,791Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Things have been different between Arthur and Merlin since Arthur found out about Merlin's magic a month ago, neither of them quite know what to do with the buzzing tension that has started following them. Merlin isn't sure it's worth the risk of pursuing, and Arthur isn't willing to push him and strain their friendship anymore than it is. But when visiting nobles upset the precarious balance of Camelot, Merlin will have to reach for the limits of his abilities to keep the magical community hidden, and Arthur will have to reckon with exactly what lengths he'll go through to keep Merlin safe while he does it.

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,805Chapters: 38/?Kudos: 85

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: Yo ho and a bottle full rum
entry.summary:
Author: Theroundbartable

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,893Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 152

Summary: After over a thousand years of waiting, thinking he found Arthur again only to learn he'd been completely fooled several times, Merlin spends most of his time drunk at sea. The legend is fake, the story of Arthur has been distorted by time and the current King is a massive asshole. Merlin's life as the cheap pirate Dragoon, however, is disrupted when Sir Leon thinks he found him. The King's son, Arthur, named after the legendary King, might be the one.or - the pirate reincarnation au no one asked for

entry.summary:

entry.title: Take My Life (And Hold It Tight)
entry.summary:
Author: DollopheadedMerlin

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 20,421Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 40

Summary: After Gaius dies at the hands of Agravaine in the events of The Secret Sharer, Merlin reveals his magic to Arthur as a last ditch effort to see if Destiny was truly on his side.What follows is a terrible series of revelations, dubious rituals, offensive job offers, and lots of not-quite secrets still to be revealed. A season 4 & 5 rewrite where everything is worse.

entry.title: Thirty Days of Light
entry.summary:
Author: loser_boy08

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 19,566Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

Summary: Thirty days. Thirty stories. One month of becoming. At Camelot University, June arrives with rainbow banners, late-night conversations, bad coffee, and the slow, sometimes messy work of figuring out who you are and who you want to be. Merlin is learning how to say things out loud. Gwen has receipts. Arthur is not who Merlin thought he was. Elyan has a name that fits. Freya finds a word that finally makes sense. And somewhere between first dates, almost-confessions, and found family filling up too-small rooms, everything begins to shift. A Pride Month collection of interconnected moments — hopeful, romantic, messy, and real.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The Letter
entry.summary:
Author: loser_boy08

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 614Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: One year later, Merlin writes a letter to the person he used to be — about fear, about finding himself, and about everything that came after. Or: a story about coming out, found family, and the quiet, hard-earned joy of becoming.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Masquerade Ball
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,957Chapters: 1/4Kudos: 20

Summary: Attending a secret sex party at Lord Godwin's invitation, Arthur finds his own servant, Merlin, among the masks—even though he specifically told him not to come. In this sinful night where identities are hidden, Arthur seizes his first and last chance to claim the servant he has desired for years. Disguising his voice with selfish hunger, he whispers to Merlin: "Will you sleep with me?"

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Discarded
entry.summary:
Author: In_aweof_writing

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 327Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 5

Summary: Merlin had almost said it then. Everything about the magic and the love that was his soul's bedrock. But he was a creature built for sacrifice, and so he had buried his agony and promised Arthur she would be a magnificent Queen.   For the prompt "Regret"

entry.title: A straight approach to being queer
entry.summary:
Author: SueRose

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 161,580Chapters: 41/?Kudos: 160

Summary: Rich nepo boy Arthur Pendragon joins his university's queer club. And pretends to be queer, because he needs to write a paper about queer representation. But.... He has not expected this. This being the leader of the club, namely Merlins Emrys, who does not believe a word he says. Will he be able to appear queer enough to his new peers? Or will all of this end up in a giant disaster?

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: You were the one to teach me how to use knives: Vol 5
entry.summary:
Author: Obsessedwithfanfiction

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,705Chapters: 5/?Kudos: 79

Summary: Morgana's memory curse is still in place, but Leon's no longer the only person suspicious of her. Gwen's got a mystery to solve and a long-lost brother to deal with. Morgana's determined to get closer to Merlin again to try and find out how long he's been hiding his magic from her. Meanwhile Merlin's just flattered to be receiving a Lady's attention, though with Gwaine coming back into his life, that might not be the only attention he's receiving. And Arthur's struggling his way back through his character growth and what kind of King he wants to be...

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

  • I am finally BACK baby!!!
  • In NZ
  • living my best life
  • Do I have a solid internet connection?
  • no!
  • Do I have a job?
  • Nope!
  • Have I finally relaxed maybe a single inch?
  • MAYBE!
  • Am I still obsessed with this ridiculous show and how much they all love each other in new and tragic ways?
  • Hell yes!
  • Fix-It
  • Series 2 onwards rewrite
  • Pls read the other parts first or this will make no sense
  • What if BBC's Merlin had emotional catharsis?
  • And consistency?
  • And a head writer who cared more about all these characters having long conversations with each other
  • Than actually advancing the plot
  • Ofc everyone is still in love with Merlin
  • And also Gwen
  • Guys I hate to jinx it but I think this is finally the part where the title should make sense
  • don't quote me though
  • No beta we die like Uther should have done seasons before he did
  • did ya miss me
  • I am going to try and update every 3 weeks ish on a Friday but it will be dependent on internet connection
